items.title: [Google Play 中评] ★3 the character design is nice. my issues
items.summary: the character design is nice. my issues would be that some types of teams arent explained like its a bit difficult to understand how to build a team for like poison or counter properly without an guide from a third source. the other is the game constantly freezes when i complete a psyche deepdive which im forced to close and open the game again. the second one is more of an issue so fix this and ill add stars
items.author: AzizMain

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 this game is a gem
items.author: HaruTheFrog

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★4 great art, really enjoying the lovecraft
items.summary: great art, really enjoying the lovecraftian story (its just much hovercraft without the obscene racism), feels fun for being a gacha game at its core, I would say though that some of the designs on the younger presenting characters are questionable at best, like, they might be old in the lore, but that doesn't come across very well.
items.author: Hal Frost

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 eu amor esse jogo tem PT BR 🇧🇷 e também
items.summary: eu amor esse jogo tem PT BR 🇧🇷 e também da para pegar todos os personagens que eu gosto já que retornam com frequência eu recomendo que dei uma chance para ele 😊

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 game nya seru, sebenarnya sistem gacha n
items.summary: game nya seru, sebenarnya sistem gacha nya lumayan lah, tapi harga top up nya itu mahal banget. Sering ada karakter yang kalo mau nyepin itu harus bayar dan harga nya gak murah karena game nya tidak menerapkan regional pricing atau mata uangnya mengikuti dollar. after all semuanya bagus, dari design dan alurnya mantap. Saya ada saran untuk membuat gaya lain dari karakternya, jadi pose tampilan karakternya bisa berubah.
items.author: Dian Rahmawati
